name: Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine confectioners' sugar and dry powdered milk in a bowl; set aside.
2. In the top of a double boiler, melt butter and peanut butter together over low heat.
3. Add corn syrup, water, and vanilla to the melted mixture.
4. Stir in about half of the dry ingredients until well combined.
5. Add the remaining dry ingredients and stir until very smooth.
6. Mix in chopped peanuts.
7. Pour the mixture into a buttered 8-inch square pan.
8. Cut into squares when firm.
9. Makes about 48 pieces.
